name: Dwarf

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You cannot discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: Whenever you make an Intelligence (History) check related to the origin of stonework, you are considered proficient in the History skill and add double your proficiency bonus to the check, instead of your normal proficiency bonus.

traits.name: Dwarven Combat Training
traits.description: You have proficiency with the battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, and warhammer.

traits.name: Tool Proficiency
traits.description: You gain proficiency with the artisan's tools of your choice: smith's tools, brewer's supplies, or mason's tools.

subraces.name: Hill Dwarf
subraces.description: As a hill dwarf, you have keen senses, deep intuition, and remarkable resilience.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 every time you gain a level.

description: Dwarves stand between 4 and 5 feet tall and average about 150 pounds. Your size is Medium.

name: Elf

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You cannot discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic cannot put you to sleep.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: Elves do not need to sleep. Instead, they meditate deeply, remaining semiconscious, for 4 hours a day. (The Common word for such meditation is "trance.") While meditating, you can dream after a fashion; such dreams are actually mental exercises that have become reflexive through years of practice. After resting this way, you gain the same benefit that a human does from 8 hours of sleep.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

subraces.name: High Elf
subraces.description: As a high elf, you have a keen mind and a mastery of at least the basics of magic. In many fantasy gaming worlds, there are two kinds of high elves. One type is haughty and reclusive, believing themselves to be superior to non-elves and even other elves. The other type is more common and more friendly, and often encountered among humans and other races.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.description: You have proficiency with the longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.

traits.name: High Elf Cantrip
traits.description: You know one cantrip of your choice form the wizard spell list. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Extra Language
traits.description: You can speak, read, and write one extra language of your choice.

subraces.name: Elven Lineage: Drow
subraces.description: Darkvision (120 ft.). Dancing Lights. Faerie Fire. Darkness.

traits.name: Darkvision (120 ft.)
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

traits.name: Dancing Lights
traits.description: You know the spell Dancing Lights.

traits.name: Faerie Fire
traits.description: You know the spell Faerie Fire.

traits.name: Darkness
traits.description: You know the spell Darkness.

subraces.name: Elven Lineage: High Elf
subraces.description: High Elf: Cantrip Versatility. Detect Magic. Misty Step.

traits.name: High Elf: Cantrip Versatility
traits.description: You know the Prestidigitation cantrip. Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you can replace that cantrip with a different cantrip from the Wizard spell list.

traits.name: Detect Magic
traits.description: You know the spell Detect Magic.

traits.name: Misty Step
traits.description: You know the spell Misty Step.

subraces.name: Elven Lineage: Wood Elf
subraces.description: Wood Elf: Movement Speed Increase. Longstrider. Pass without Trace.

traits.name: Wood Elf: Movement Speed Increase
traits.description: Your Movement Speed increases to 35 feet.

traits.name: Longstrider
traits.description: You learn the spell Longstrider.

traits.name: Pass without Trace
traits.description: You learn the spell Pass without Trace.

description: Elves range from under 5 to over 6 feet tall and have slender builds. Your size is Medium.

name: Halfling

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throw against being frightened.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

traits.name: Lucky
traits.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 for an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

subraces.name: Lightfoot Halfling
subraces.description: As a lightfoot halfling, you can easily hide from notice, even using other people as cover. You're inclined to be affable and get along well with others. Lightfoots are more prone to wanderlust than other halflings, and often dwell alongside other races or take up a nomadic life.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: You can attempt to hide even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

description: Halflings average about 3 feet tall and weigh about 40 pounds. Your size is Small.

name: Human
description: Humans vary widely in height and build, from barely 5 feet to well over 6 feet tall. Regardless of your position in that range, your size is Medium.

name: Dragonborn

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.description: You have draconic ancestry. Choose one type of dragon from the Draconic Ancestry table. Your breath weapon and damage resistance are determined by the dragon type, as shown in the table.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.description:
You can use your action to exhale destructive energy. Your draconic ancestry determines the size, shape, and damage type of the exhalation.
When you use your breath weapon, each creature in the area of the exhalation must make a saving throw, the type of which is determined by your draconic ancestry. The DC for this saving throw equals 8 + your Constitution modifier + your proficiency bonus. A creature takes 2d6 damage on a failed save, and half as much damage on a successful one. The damage increases to 3d6 at 6th level, 4d6 at 11th level, and 5d6 at 16th level.
After you use your breath weapon, you cannot use it again until you complete a short or long rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.description: You have resistance to the damage type associated with your draconic ancestry.

subraces.name: Draconic Ancestor: Black
subraces.description: Breath Weapon: Acid. Damage Resistance: Acid.

traits.name: Breath Weapon: Acid
traits.description:
When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of magical energy in either a 15-foot Cone or a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide (choose the shape each time). Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Constitution modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes 1d10 acid damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by 1d10 when you reach character levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).
You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance: Acid
traits.description: You have Resistance to acid damage, as determined by your Draconic Ancestry trait.

subraces.name: Draconic Ancestor: Blue
subraces.description: Breath Weapon: Lightning. Damage Resistance: Lightning.

traits.name: Breath Weapon: Lightning
traits.description:
When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of magical energy in either a 15-foot Cone or a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide (choose the shape each time). Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Constitution modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes 1d10 lightning damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by 1d10 when you reach character levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).
You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance: Lightning
traits.description: You have Resistance to lightning damage, as determined by your Draconic Ancestry trait.

subraces.name: Draconic Ancestor: Brass
subraces.description: Breath Weapon: Fire. Damage Resistance: Fire.

traits.name: Breath Weapon: Fire
traits.description:
When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of magical energy in either a 15-foot Cone or a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide (choose the shape each time). Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Constitution modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes 1d10 fire damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by 1d10 when you reach character levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).
You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance: Fire
traits.description: You have Resistance to fire damage, as determined by your Draconic Ancestry trait.

subraces.name: Draconic Ancestor: Bronze
subraces.description: Breath Weapon: Lightning. Damage Resistance: Lightning.

traits.name: Breath Weapon: Lightning
traits.description:

On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by 1d10 when you reach character levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).
You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance: Lightning
traits.description: You have Resistance to lightning damage, as determined by your Draconic Ancestry trait.

subraces.name: Draconic Ancestor: Copper
subraces.description: Breath Weapon: Acid. Damage Resistance: Acid.

traits.name: Breath Weapon: Acid
traits.description:

Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Constitution modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes 1d10 acid damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by 1d10 when you reach character levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).
You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance: Acid
traits.description: You have Resistance to acid damage, as determined by your Draconic Ancestry trait.

subraces.name: Draconic Ancestor: Gold
subraces.description: Breath Weapon: Fire. Damage Resistance: Fire.

traits.name: Breath Weapon: Fire
traits.description:
When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of magical energy in either a 15-foot Cone or a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide (choose the shape each time). Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Constitution modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes 1d10 fire damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by 1d10 when you reach character levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).
You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance: Fire
traits.description: You have Resistance to fire damage, as determined by your Draconic Ancestry trait.

subraces.name: Draconic Ancestor: Green
subraces.description: Breath Weapon: Poison. Damage Resistance: Poison.

traits.name: Breath Weapon: Poison
traits.description:
When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of magical energy in either a 15-foot Cone or a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide (choose the shape each time). Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Constitution modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes 1d10 poison damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by 1d10 when you reach character levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).
You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance: Poison
traits.description: You have Resistance to poison damage, as determined by your Draconic Ancestry trait.

subraces.name: Draconic Ancestor: Red
subraces.description: Breath Weapon: Fire. Damage Resistance: Fire.

traits.name: Breath Weapon: Fire
traits.description:

You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.description: You have Resistance to fire damage, as determined by your Draconic Ancestry trait.

subraces.name: Draconic Ancestor: Silver
subraces.description: Breath Weapon: Cold. Damage Resistance: Cold.

traits.name: Breath Weapon: Cold
traits.description:
When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of magical energy in either a 15-foot Cone or a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide (choose the shape each time). Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Constitution modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes 1d10 cold damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by 1d10 when you reach character levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).
You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance: Cold
traits.description: You have Resistance to cold damage, as determined by your Draconic Ancestry trait.

subraces.name: Draconic Ancestor: White
subraces.description: Breath Weapon: Cold. Damage Resistance: Cold.

traits.name: Breath Weapon: Cold
traits.description:
When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of magical energy in either a 15-foot Cone or a 30-foot Line that is 5 feet wide (choose the shape each time). Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Constitution modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature takes 1d10 cold damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by 1d10 when you reach character levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).
You can use this Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance: Cold
traits.description: You have Resistance to cold damage, as determined by your Draconic Ancestry trait.

description: Dragonborn are taller and heavier than humans, standing well over 6 feet tall and averaging almost 250 pounds. Your size is Medium.

name: Gnome

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You cannot discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

traits.name: Gnome Cunning
traits.description: You have advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

subraces.name: Rock Gnome
subraces.description: As a rock gnome, you have a natural inventiveness and hardiness beyond that of other gnomes.

traits.name: Artificer's Lore
traits.description: Whenever you make an Intelligence (History) check related to magic items, alchemical objects, or technological devices, you can add twice your proficiency bonus, instead of any proficiency bonus you normally apply.

traits.name: Tinker
traits.description:
You have proficiency with artisan's tools (tinker's tools). Using those tools, you can spend 1 hour and 10 gp worth of materials to construct a Tiny clockwork device (AC 5, 1 hp). The device ceases to function after 24 hours (unless you spend 1 hour repairing it to keep the device functioning), or when you use your action to dismantle it; at that time, you can reclaim the materials used to create it. You can have up to three such devices active at a time.
When you create a device, choose one of the following options:
Clockwork Toy: This toy is a clockwork animal, monster, or person, such as a frog, mouse, bird, dragon, or soldier. When placed on the ground, the toy moves 5 feet across the ground on each of your turns in a random direction. It makes noises as appropriate to the creature it represents.
Fire Starter: The device produces a miniature flame, which you can use to light a candle, torch, or campfire. Using the device requires your action.
Music Box: When opened, this music box plays a single song at a moderate volume. The box stops playing when it reaches the song's end or when it is closed.

subraces.name: Gnomish Lineage: Forest Gnome
subraces.description: Gnomish Lineage: Forest Gnome. Minor Illusion.

traits.name: Gnomish Lineage: Forest Gnome
traits.description: You always have the Speak with Animals spell prepared. You can cast it without a spell slot a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest. You can also use any spell slots you have to cast the spell.

traits.name: Minor Illusion
traits.description: You know the spell Minor Illusion.

subraces.name: Gnomish Lineage: Rock Gnome
subraces.description: Gnomish Lineage: Rock Gnome. Mending.

traits.name: Gnomish Lineage: Rock Gnome
traits.description: You know the Prestidigitation cantrip. In addition, you can spend 10 minutes casting Prestidigitation to create a Tiny clockwork device (AC 5, 1 HP), such as a toy, fire starter, or music box. When you create the device, you determine its function by choosing one effect from Prestidigitation; the device produces that effect whenever you or another creature takes a Bonus Action to activate it with a touch. If the chosen effect has options within it, you choose one of those options for the device when you create it. For example, if you choose the spell’s ignite-extinguish effect, you determine whether the device ignites or extinguishes fire; the device doesn’t do both. You can have three such devices in existence at a time, and each falls apart 8 hours after its creation or when you dismantle it with a touch as a Utilize action.

traits.name: Mending
traits.description: You know the cantrip Mending.

description: Gnomes are between 3 and 4 feet tall and average about 40 pounds. Your size is Small.

name: Half-Elf

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You cannot discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic cannot put you to sleep.

traits.name: Skill Versatility
traits.description: You gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.

description: Half-elves are about the same size as humans, ranging from 5 to 6 feet tall. Your size is Medium.

name: Half-Orc

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You cannot discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

traits.name: Savage Attacks
traits.description: When you score a critical hit with a melee weapon attack, you can roll one of the weapon's damage dice one additional time and add it to the extra damage of the critical hit.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. you cannot use this feature again until you finish a long rest.

traits.name: Menacing
traits.description: You gain proficiency in the Intimidation skill.

description: Half-orcs are somewhat larger and bulkier than humans, and they range from 5 to well over 6 feet tall. Your size is Medium.

name: Tiefling

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You cannot discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

traits.name: Hellish Resistance
traits.description: You have resistance to fire damage.

traits.name: Infernal Legacy
traits.description: You know the thaumaturgy cantrip. When you reach 3rd level, you can cast the hellish rebuke spell as a 2nd-level spell once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. When you reach 5th level, you can cast the darkness spell once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

subraces.name: Fiendish Legacy: Abyssal
subraces.description: Damage Resistance: Poison. Poison Spray. Ray of Sickness. Hold Person.

traits.name: Damage Resistance: Poison
traits.description: You have Resistance to Poison damage.

traits.name: Poison Spray
traits.description: You know the spell Poison Spray.

traits.name: Ray of Sickness
traits.description: You know the spell Ray of Sickness.

traits.name: Hold Person
traits.description: You know the spell Hold Person.

subraces.name: Fiendish Legacy: Chthonic
subraces.description: Damage Resistance: Necrotic. Chill Touch. False Life. Ray of Enfeeblement.

traits.name: Damage Resistance: Necrotic
traits.description: You have Resistance to Necrotic damage.

traits.name: Chill Touch
traits.description: You know the spell Chill Touch.

traits.name: False Life
traits.description: You know the spell False Life.

traits.name: Ray of Enfeeblement
traits.description: You know the spell Ray of Enfeeblement.

subraces.name: Fiendish Legacy: Infernal
subraces.description: Damage Resistance: Fire. Fire Bolt. Hellish Rebuke. Darkness.

traits.name: Damage Resistance: Fire
traits.description: You have Resistance to Fire damage.

traits.name: Fire Bolt
traits.description: You know the spell Fire Bolt.

traits.name: Hellish Rebuke
traits.description: You know the spell Hellish Rebuke.

traits.name: Darkness
traits.description: You know the spell Darkness.

description: Tieflings are about the same size and build as humans. Your size is Medium.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry
traits.description:
You are descended from Giants. Choose one of the following benefits-a supernatural boon from your ancestry; you can use the chosen benefit a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest:
Cloud's Jaunt (Cloud Giant). As a Bonus Action, you magically teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.
Fire's Burn (Fire Giant). When you hit a target with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can also deal 1d10 Fire damage to that target.
Frost's Chill (Frost Giant). When you hit a target with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can also deal 1d6 Cold damage to that target and reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.
Hill's Tumble (Hill Giant). When you hit a Large or smaller creature with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can give that target the Prone condition.
Stone's Endurance (Stone Giant). When you take damage, you can take a Reaction to roll 1d12. Add your Constitution modifier to the number rolled and reduce the damage by that total.
- Storm's Thunder (Storm Giant). When you take damage from a creature within 60 feet of you, you can take a Reaction to deal 1d8 Thunder damage to that creature.

traits.name: Large Form
traits.description: Starting at character level 5, you can change your size to Large as a Bonus Action if you're in a big enough space. This transformation lasts for 10 minutes or until you end it (no action required). For that duration, you have Advantage on Strength checks, and your Speed increases by 10 feet. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You have Advantage on any ability check you make to end the Grappled condition. You also count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity.

subraces.name: Giant Ancestry: Cloud's Jaunt
subraces.description: Giant Ancestry: Cloud's Jaunt.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry: Cloud's Jaunt
traits.description: As a Bonus Action, you magically teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

subraces.name: Giant Ancestry: Fire's Burn
subraces.description: Giant Ancestry: Fire's Burn.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry: Fire's Burn
traits.description: When you hit a target with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can also deal 1d10 Fire damage to that target.

subraces.name: Giant Ancestry: Frost's Chill
subraces.description: Giant Ancestry: Frost's Chill.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry: Frost's Chill
traits.description: When you hit a target with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can also deal 1d6 Cold damage to that target and reduce its Speed by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

subraces.name: Giant Ancestry: Hill's Tumble
subraces.description: Giant Ancestry: Hill's Tumble.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry: Hill's Tumble
traits.description: When you hit a Large or smaller creature with an attack roll and deal damage to it, you can give that target the Prone condition.

subraces.name: Giant Ancestry: Stone's Endurance
subraces.description: Giant Ancestry: Stone's Endurance.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry: Stone's Endurance
traits.description: When you take damage, you can take a Reaction to roll 1d12. Add your Constitution modifier to the number rolled and reduce the damage by that total.

subraces.name: Giant Ancestry: Storm's Thunder
subraces.description: Giant Ancestry: Storm's Thunder.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry: Storm's Thunder
traits.description: When you take damage from a creature within 60 feet of you, you can take a Reaction to deal 1d8 Thunder damage to that creature.

traits.name: Adrenaline Rush
traits.description:
You can take the Dash action as a Bonus Action. When you do so, you gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus.
You can use this trait a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Short or Long Rest.

traits.name: Darkvision (120 ft.)
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead. Once you use this trait, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.
